body:
severity: warn
timestamp: 2026-06-17T14:10:00Z

findings:
System startup completed 2026-06-17. Two critical issues were found and immediately fixed:

1. [FIXED] signalapi O(N) eventstore scan bug — ReadFrom in FileStore was JSON-decoding all 82,603 records on every 2-second poll, causing 86% CPU for 24+ hours. Fixed by adding per-file max-sequence cache (fileMaxSeq map) in eventstore/file_store.go. Closed journal files with max_seq < cursor are now skipped entirely. New signalapi instance restarted; completing initial 82K-record index build at ~23% CPU; will drop to near-0% in steady state.

2. [FIXED] jon-agent ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not in process env — jon-agent was dying on startup with 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set'. Restarted with key sourced from EMILY/var/emily-secrets.env; now listening on :8084.

Open issues:

3. EDGAR EFTS 500 errors (nt-…

suggested_fix:
1. dashboard: add -addr :8087 to startup script. 2. guidance: review pkg/intelligence/guidance thresholds; spot-check press releases with low scores. 3. form4: check if form4-watcher uses EDGAR EFTS; if so, add same skip/retry logic as nt-watcher. 4. MySQL: set MYSQL_URL and start projector with -market-store var/market-data. 5. Monitor EDGAR EFTS recovery.
title: FatBaby obs [warn]: FatBaby system health check: 2 fixes applied, 5 issues catalogued for follow-up
